tasks.description: In calc.py, the add(a, b) function returns a - b instead of a + b. Fix it so the tests pass.
tasks.diff_summary:
diff -ru '--exclude=__pycache__' '--exclude=*.pyc' '--exclude=.git' '--exclude=artifacts' '--exclude=target' scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_001/calc.py /tmp/px-repofix-fix_001-2047454-a6cac2f714cf4f32a6608fc6a1f77f94/calc.py
--- scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_001/calc.py	2026-06-15 09:50:19.573541250 -0400
+++ /tmp/px-repofix-fix_001-2047454-a6cac2f714cf4f32a6608fc6a1f77f94/calc.py	2026-06-15 11:54:40.200251892 -0400
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
 def add(a, b):
-    return a - b
+    return a + b

tasks.description: In seq.py, last(xs) raises IndexError because it uses xs[len(xs)] (off by one). Fix it to return the last element.
tasks.diff_summary:
diff -ru '--exclude=__pycache__' '--exclude=*.pyc' '--exclude=.git' '--exclude=artifacts' '--exclude=target' scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_002/seq.py /tmp/px-repofix-fix_002-2047454-ef8b7104b38c46aaa374594f3a641673/seq.py
--- scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_002/seq.py	2026-06-15 09:50:19.573746791 -0400
+++ /tmp/px-repofix-fix_002-2047454-ef8b7104b38c46aaa374594f3a641673/seq.py	2026-06-15 11:54:59.142670059 -0400
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
 def last(xs):
-    return xs[len(xs)]
+    return xs[-1]

tasks.description: In mathx.py, double(x) computes x * 2 but never returns it (returns None). Add the missing return.
In counts.py, get_count(d, k) raises KeyError when k is absent. Make it return 0 for missing keys.
tasks.diff_summary:
diff -ru '--exclude=__pycache__' '--exclude=*.pyc' '--exclude=.git' '--exclude=artifacts' '--exclude=target' scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_004/counts.py /tmp/px-repofix-fix_004-2047454-0bcc81fcf3184efb8db7ff0f088976fb/counts.py
--- scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_004/counts.py	2026-06-15 09:50:19.573999933 -0400
+++ /tmp/px-repofix-fix_004-2047454-0bcc81fcf3184efb8db7ff0f088976fb/counts.py	2026-06-15 11:55:45.751698844 -0400
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
 def get_count(d, k):
-    return d[k]
+    return d.get(k, 0)

tasks.description: In strutil.py, reverse(s) returns the string unchanged. Make it return the reversed string.
tasks.diff_summary:
diff -ru '--exclude=__pycache__' '--exclude=*.pyc' '--exclude=.git' '--exclude=artifacts' '--exclude=target' scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_005/strutil.py /tmp/px-repofix-fix_005-2047454-8f0a1ac6d4d04c07b9ac205a1d6ce24c/strutil.py
--- scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_005/strutil.py	2026-06-15 09:50:19.574125337 -0400
+++ /tmp/px-repofix-fix_005-2047454-8f0a1ac6d4d04c07b9ac205a1d6ce24c/strutil.py	2026-06-15 11:56:04.401110431 -0400
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
 def reverse(s):
-    return s
+    return s[::-1]

tasks.description: In nums.py, evens(xs) keeps ODD numbers (x % 2 == 1). Fix it to keep even numbers.
tasks.diff_summary:
diff -ru '--exclude=__pycache__' '--exclude=*.pyc' '--exclude=.git' '--exclude=artifacts' '--exclude=target' scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_006/nums.py /tmp/px-repofix-fix_006-2047454-89b41efd802e4f5a8bb2ef9d74841a9f/nums.py
--- scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_006/nums.py	2026-06-15 09:50:19.574248297 -0400
+++ /tmp/px-repofix-fix_006-2047454-89b41efd802e4f5a8bb2ef9d74841a9f/nums.py	2026-06-15 11:56:23.123544237 -0400
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
 def evens(xs):
-    return [x for x in xs if x % 2 == 1]
+    return [x for x in xs if x % 2 == 0]

tasks.description: In fact.py, factorial(0) recurses forever because the base case is `n == 1`. Fix the base case so factorial(0) == 1.
tasks.diff_summary:
diff -ru '--exclude=__pycache__' '--exclude=*.pyc' '--exclude=.git' '--exclude=artifacts' '--exclude=target' scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_007/fact.py /tmp/px-repofix-fix_007-2047454-18ad162c245b4383864350edcb82165e/fact.py
--- scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_007/fact.py	2026-06-15 09:50:19.574410453 -0400
+++ /tmp/px-repofix-fix_007-2047454-18ad162c245b4383864350edcb82165e/fact.py	2026-06-15 11:56:42.772102176 -0400
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
 def factorial(n):
-    if n == 1:
+    if n == 0:
         return 1
     return n * factorial(n - 1)

tasks.description: In valid.py, in_range(x, lo, hi) uses OR so it's always true. Fix it to require x within [lo, hi].
tasks.diff_summary:
diff -ru '--exclude=__pycache__' '--exclude=*.pyc' '--exclude=.git' '--exclude=artifacts' '--exclude=target' scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_008/valid.py /tmp/px-repofix-fix_008-2047454-b31f0a203e1d428b9952eee84d151c3b/valid.py
--- scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_008/valid.py	2026-06-15 09:50:19.574538384 -0400
+++ /tmp/px-repofix-fix_008-2047454-b31f0a203e1d428b9952eee84d151c3b/valid.py	2026-06-15 11:57:01.215622089 -0400
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
 def in_range(x, lo, hi):
-    return x >= lo or x <= hi
+    return x >= lo and x <= hi

tasks.description: In helper.py, slugify replaces spaces with '' instead of '-', so make_slug in api.py is wrong. Fix slugify.
In acc.py, Accumulator.add overwrites total (self.total = x) instead of accumulating. Fix it to add.
tasks.diff_summary:
diff -ru '--exclude=__pycache__' '--exclude=*.pyc' '--exclude=.git' '--exclude=artifacts' '--exclude=target' scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_010/acc.py /tmp/px-repofix-fix_010-2047454-6bd13cca4e2a4ad0ba51d74366bfa59b/acc.py
--- scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_010/acc.py	2026-06-15 09:50:19.574662768 -0400
+++ /tmp/px-repofix-fix_010-2047454-6bd13cca4e2a4ad0ba51d74366bfa59b/acc.py	2026-06-15 11:57:53.881087560 -0400
@@ -2,5 +2,5 @@
     def __init__(self):
         self.total = 0
     def add(self, x):
-        self.total = x
+        self.total += x
         return self.total

tasks.description: In math_utils.py, square(x) returns x + x instead of x * x, so sum_of_squares in stats.py is wrong. Fix square.
In running.py, running_max initializes m = 0, so it returns 0 for all-negative inputs. Fix the initialization to handle negatives.
In avg.py, average(xs) raises ZeroDivisionError on an empty list. Make it return 0 for empty input.
tasks.diff_summary:
diff -ru '--exclude=__pycache__' '--exclude=*.pyc' '--exclude=.git' '--exclude=artifacts' '--exclude=target' scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_013/avg.py /tmp/px-repofix-fix_013-2047454-c76d286e9d6f418d904594591fa1f442/avg.py
--- scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_013/avg.py	2026-06-15 09:50:19.575136381 -0400
+++ /tmp/px-repofix-fix_013-2047454-c76d286e9d6f418d904594591fa1f442/avg.py	2026-06-15 11:59:09.643150489 -0400
@@ -1,2 +1,4 @@
 def average(xs):
+    if not xs:
+        return 0
     return sum(xs) / len(xs)

tasks.description: In ops.py, one of the four functions is wrong: mul(a, b) returns a + b instead of a * b. Fix it.
tasks.diff_summary:
diff -ru '--exclude=__pycache__' '--exclude=*.pyc' '--exclude=.git' '--exclude=artifacts' '--exclude=target' scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_014/ops.py /tmp/px-repofix-fix_014-2047454-24466ce8f05942c8abc9cdc89e962ee6/ops.py
--- scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_014/ops.py	2026-06-15 09:50:19.575453999 -0400
+++ /tmp/px-repofix-fix_014-2047454-24466ce8f05942c8abc9cdc89e962ee6/ops.py	2026-06-15 11:59:27.837638692 -0400
@@ -4,7 +4,7 @@
 def sub(a, b):
     return a - b
 
-def mul(a, b):
+    return a * b
     return a + b
 
 def div(a, b):
